Name: PUT_HEX
Description: PUT but displays number in hex instead

Name: UNIT_CLEAR_ANALYSIS
Description: Makes all affinities show up as ? in analysis again

Name: SET_UNIT_PERSONA_MASK
Description: Sets the persona given when capturing this enemy

Parameters.Name: BGM ID
Parameters.Description: NOT Cue ID, this uses the hardcoded values

Parameters.Name: New Affinity Value (Same as you use on TBL)
Skill ID
Parameters.Description: Note: Only mods that add this via Custom Bonus Tweaks will have a non zero value here

Parameters.Name: A, B or C value for voicepack

Name: SELTEX_FORCE
Description: Setting this forces the next instance of the Joker Select Dialogue to be a specific ID.

Name: AI_ACT_ITEM
Description: Allows Party AI to use selected item

Name: GET_SKILL_FROM_ITEM
Description: Returns the skill ID of an associated item
